chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Prohibition of Hunting in the Sanctuary and Its Rulings

text: 2365 - وَ رَوَى صَفْوَانُ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ يُذْبَحُ اَلصَّيْدُ فِي اَلْحَرَمِ وَ إِنْ صِيدَ فِي اَلْحِلِّ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2365 - Safwan narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan:
Abu Abdullah (as) said: "Hunting is not to be slaughtered in the Sacred Sanctuary (Haram), even if it was hunted in the permissible (Hil)."
